violations.text: Small containers are being used as scoops in containers of dry ingredients. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. New Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2025

The spout of the dipper well was observed below the flood rim of the well. This spout must have an air-gap. An approved backflow prevention device is required in order to prevent backflow of a solid, liquid, or gas contaminant into the water supply at each point of use at a food establishment. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2025

The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea.http://www.health.ri.gov/publications/guidelines/RespondingToVomitingAndDiarrheaInFoodEstablishments.pdf Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/20/2023

Staff failed to sanitize equipment and utensils after washing and rinsing them. After being cleaned, equipment and utensils must be sanitized in the 3-bay-sink or dishwasher.PIC informed of proper sanitizing procedures. New Violation. Correct By: 07/20/2023
